subcodes.first_line: We make mention of the land which God hath made the resting-place of the footsteps of My loved ones who, when they heard the Call, hastened unto Me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر الارض التی جعلها الله موطی قدوم احبائی الذین اذا سمعوا الندا اقبلوا الی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @praise and encouragement, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @martyrs and martyrdom, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @living waters; water of life
